name: PureCycle Technologies, Inc.
business: PureCycle Technologies, Inc. commercializes a patented dissolution recycling technology for polypropylene that produces PureFive resin, a near-virgin quality recycled polypropylene. The company sells PureFive resin to a wide range of industries including packaging, automotive, textiles, and consumer goods.

exposures.sentence: We are a Florida-based corporation focused on commercializing a patented dissolution recycling technology for polypropylene that physically separates the polymer from other plastics, colors, odors and impurities (the Technology).

catalysts.event: Thailand Facility expected to become operational
catalysts.sentence: The Thailand Facility is expected to become operational in late 2027.

catalysts.event: Belgium Facility projected to become operational
catalysts.sentence: The Belgium Facility is projected to become operational in mid to late 2028.

catalysts.event: Augusta Facility projected to become operational
catalysts.sentence: The Augusta Facility is projected to become operational by 2030.

tamClaims.claim: More than 170 billion pounds of polypropylene manufactured annually worldwide
tamClaims.sentence: Polypropylene is one of the world's most versatile and widely utilized thermoplastic polymers, with more than 170 billion pounds manufactured annually for use in consumer and industrial applications.

tamClaims.claim: More than 150 billion pounds of polypropylene produced every year globally
tamClaims.sentence: More than 150 billion pounds of polypropylene is produced every year across the globe.
